findings.description: The HTML rendering introduces extraneous content and artifacts near Figure 10.
findings.evidence: On PDF page 15, Figure 10 displays a map with a scale and legend, followed by its caption. On HTML page 15, the map's legend is missing, a black rectangular artifact appears, and extraneous content ('2020' and a new map image) is injected below the caption, which is not present in the source PDF.
